raw:
{
  "judge_id": "judge1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 2,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 1,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 2,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identifies the central thesis of the paper but does not provide a detailed analysis of how the draft drifts from the named load-bearing concept (instruction-following) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (COMET-22) and articulates the delta between it and the artifact's findings, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "RX.1": "All output is presented as equally confident with no uncertainty disclosure.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on claim/evidence issues rather than the scope adherence of the artifact.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression in the form of an overreaching production deployment recommendation.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the central thesis of the paper but does not provide a detailed analysis of how the draft drifts from the named load-bearing concept (instruction-following) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (COMET-22) and articulates the delta between it and the artifact's findings, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: All output is presented as equally confident with no uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on claim/evidence issues rather than the scope adherence of the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression in the form of an overreaching production deployment recommendation.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
